hero.name: Ary Wibowo
hero.title: Professional Consultant
hero.tagline: Helping businesses grow through <highlight>Strategic Consulting</highlight> — <highlight>Renewable Energy</highlight>, <highlight>Business Development</highlight>, <highlight>IT & Digital Transformation</highlight>, <highlight>HR & Operations</highlight>, <highlight>Sales & Project Management</highlight>, and <highlight>Financial Solutions</highlight>.

about.title: Professional Profile
about.summary: A blend of <highlight>Business Development</highlight>, <highlight>Client Relations</highlight>, and <highlight>Technology Expertise</highlight> for impactful business solutions.
bio: Professional consultant with over 10 years of experience in <highlight>business</highlight>, <highlight>HR</highlight>, and <highlight>IT</highlight> — spanning <highlight>Business Development</highlight>, <highlight>client relations</highlight>, <highlight>renewable energy</highlight>, and <highlight>digital transformation</highlight>. A computer engineering background strengthens an analytical approach to designing <highlight>measurable business solutions</highlight> — from <highlight>market growth strategy</highlight> to <highlight>digital system implementation</highlight>.

Experienced in leading cross-industry projects in telecommunications and energy, coordinating <highlight>multidisciplinary teams</highlight>, and developing <highlight>digital platforms</highlight> for business process automation. Combines expertise in business development, HR, sales, project management, IT, and finance to deliver <highlight>integrated consulting</highlight> that creates real impact for organizations.
about.coreStrengthsDescription: Six key areas of expertise supporting integrated consulting.

services.title: Integrated Consulting Solutions
services.description: <highlight>Renewable Energy</highlight>, <highlight>Business Development</highlight>, <highlight>IT & Digital</highlight>, <highlight>HR Consulting</highlight>, <highlight>Sales & Project Management</highlight>, and <highlight>Financial Solutions</highlight> — integrated solutions from <highlight>strategy to execution</highlight>.
services.descriptionFull: <highlight>Professional consulting services</highlight> designed to support your <highlight>business growth</highlight> across multiple sectors.
services.seeMoreRich: See full details on the <link>Services</link> page.
services.pageDescription: Integrated solutions to support your <highlight>business transformation</highlight> — from <highlight>strategic planning</highlight> to <highlight>execution</highlight>.

renewableEnergy.title: Renewable Energy Solutions
renewableEnergy.usp: Sustainable and measurable <highlight>green energy transition</highlight> strategies.
renewableEnergy.description: Consulting on planning and implementing <highlight>renewable energy solutions</highlight> for businesses seeking <highlight>operational efficiency</highlight> while committing to <highlight>environmental sustainability</highlight>.

businessDevelopment.title: Business Development Solutions
businessDevelopment.usp: Opening <highlight>new market opportunities</highlight> and strengthening <highlight>business growth</highlight>.
businessDevelopment.description: <highlight>Business expansion strategy</highlight> guidance, market opportunity identification, and <highlight>scalable growth model</highlight> development — from SMEs to enterprise-scale operations.

itDigital.title: IT & Digital Solutions
itDigital.description: <highlight>Information technology solutions</highlight> and <highlight>business process digitalization</highlight> — from workflow automation and system integration to web platform development and <highlight>AI implementation advisory</highlight>.

hrConsulting.title: HR Consulting Solutions
hrConsulting.description: Comprehensive <highlight>HR consulting</highlight> — from recruitment and talent acquisition, compensation structure, <highlight>organizational development</highlight>, to labor regulation compliance.

salesProjectManagement.title: Sales & Project Management
salesProjectManagement.description: <highlight>End-to-end project management</highlight> focused on achieving sales targets, field team coordination, <highlight>real-time reporting</highlight>, and <highlight>stakeholder management</highlight>.

financialSolutions.title: Financial Solutions
financialSolutions.description: <highlight>Financial and accounting consulting</highlight> to help businesses manage cash flow, <highlight>budget planning</highlight>, profitability analysis, and more efficient accounting processes.

contact.title: Let's Collaborate
contact.description: Have a project or want to discuss <highlight>business opportunities</highlight>? Send a message and I'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.responseNote: I usually respond within 24–48 hours. For urgent inquiries, please mention it in your message.
